title: Modal Verbs Mastery Test
description: 1200 original multiple-choice modal verb questions for General English, VSTEP, IELTS, TOEIC, and Cambridge-style practice.
sourceNotes: Original questions generated from modal meaning groups and exam-task patterns; not copied from source materials.
